mapper.sql: pevt.employee_id as pe_id, pevt.vocational_id as pev_id, pevt.vocational_name, pevt.vocational_level, pevt.evaluation_time, pevt.evaluation_mechanism, pevt.vocational_validity, pevt.remarks, pevt.new_vocational_flag, pevt.instructions_flag, pevt.check_flag, pevt.attribute1, pevt.attribute2, pevt.attribute3, pevt.id, pevt.enabled_flag, pevt.update_by, pevt.create_time, pevt.update_time, pevt.create_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.vocational_id as ${tAlias}_pev_id, ${tAlias}.vocational_name as ${tAlias}_vocational_name, ${tAlias}.vocational_level as ${tAlias}_vocational_level, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.evaluation_mechanism as ${tAlias}_evaluation_mechanism, ${tAlias}.vocational_validity as ${tAlias}_vocational_validity, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.new_vocational_flag as ${tAlias}_new_vocational_flag, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_vocational_temp (employee_id,vocational_id, vocational_name, vocational_level, evaluation_time, evaluation_mechanism, vocational_validity, remarks, new_vocational_flag, instructions_flag, check_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_by, create_time, update_time, create_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{employeeVocational.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{vocationalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vocationalLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{evaluationMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vocationalValidity,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newVocationalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_vocational_temp set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, vocational_id = #{employeeVocational.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, vocational_name = #{vocationalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vocational_level = #{vocationalLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, evaluation_mechanism = #{evaluationMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vocational_validity = #{vocationalValidity,jdbcType=DATE}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_vocational_flag = #{newVocationalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
